_provenance: schema-derived from R1 AC helpers spec. Function signatures and return shapes defined by acceptance criteria, not observed runtime output. No producer-computed values.
description: Expected contract for database.py fleet_alert_state helpers

read_fleet_alert.returns_when_active: dict with keys: tripped_at_et, triggered_reason, tripped_count, active_count, dismissed_at_et
read_fleet_alert.dismissed_at_et_type: str | None — ISO ET string if dismissed, else None

write_fleet_alert.side_effects: Upserts single row id=1 into fleet_alert_state. Sets dismissed_at_et=NULL unless provided.

clear_fleet_alert.side_effects: Deletes the id=1 row from fleet_alert_state (or no-ops if absent). Used by auto-clear timer.

connection_policy: Each helper opens its own connection. Non-blocking. Never reuses a caller's connection.
non_bot_state: These helpers NEVER read from or write to bot_state. Isolation is total.
